# PyMixEF visual mark

The PyMixEF mark was authored specifically for this project from original SVG
primitives. It depicts three group-specific trajectories measured against one
shared population axis: a compact visual description of a mixed-effects model.

No third-party artwork, stock icon, font file, or traced asset is included.
Both SVG files are distributed under the same license as the PyMixEF
repository.

- `pymixef-mark.svg` is the square favicon and compact application mark.
- `pymixef-logo.svg` pairs the trajectory mark with the PyMixEF wordmark.

Keep the trajectory geometry intact when deriving additional sizes. The SVGs
use flat colors, remain legible at favicon scale, and contain accessible
`title` and `desc` elements.
